# AIOStreams

Scraper that queries an [AIOStreams](https://github.com/Viren070/AIOStreams) instance.
AIOStreams aggregates several upstream addons behind one endpoint, so a single AIOStreams
configuration can replace running [Torrentio](torrentio.md) and [Comet](comet.md)
separately.

Unlike the other Stremio scrapers this one is per-user: the `uuid` and `password` identify
your saved configuration on the instance, and both are required alongside the URL.

<!-- BEGIN GENERATED -->
<!-- Generated by `cargo run --bin gen-docs` from each plugin's `settings_schema()`. Do not edit this block by hand. -->

**Category:** Sources

### Events

Subscribes to:

- `riven.media-item.scrape.requested`

### Settings

Set via environment variables prefixed with `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__AIOSTREAMS__`, or in the settings UI.

| Setting | Environment variable | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `url` | `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__AIOSTREAMS__url` | url | Yes | `https://aiostreamsfortheweebs.midnightignite.me/` | Base URL of your AIOStreams instance. |
| `uuid` | `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__AIOSTREAMS__uuid` | text | Yes | — | Your AIOStreams user ID. |
| `password` | `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__AIOSTREAMS__password` | secret | Yes | — | Your AIOStreams password. |
<!-- END GENERATED -->
